assignments.description: Add the populated EnergyServiceAgreementItemRecord to the EnergyServiceAgreementItems collection.
assignments.name: AddESAIRecordToList
assignments.label: Add Energy Service Agreement Item Record to List

assignments.description: Add the populated OrderProductRecipientRecord to the OrderProductRecipients collection.
assignments.name: AddOrderProductRecipientRecordToList
assignments.label: Add Order Product Recipient Record to List

assignments.description: Add sellable order products that have a recipient to the SellableOrderProducts list, add their order product IDs to the OrderProductIds list, and add order product recipient’s service point market identifiers to the ServicePointMarketIdentifiers list.
assignments.name: AddSellableProductsIdsAndMarketIdentifiers
assignments.label: Add Sellable Products, IDs & Market Identifiers

assignments.description: Add the populated ServicePointRecord to the ServicePointRecords collection
assignments.name: AddServicePointList
assignments.label: Add Service Point to List

assignments.description: Add the populated ServicePointRecord to the UpdatedServicePoints collection.
assignments.name: AddServicePointRecordToList
assignments.label: Add Service Point Record to List

assignments.description: Aggregate both new and existing Service Point records into a single collection for further processing.
assignments.name: AggregateServicePoints
assignments.label: Aggregate Service Points

assignments.description: Populate the AddressRecord variable with the appropriate address field values.
assignments.name: SetAddressRecordFields
assignments.label: Set Address Record Fields

assignments.description: Set asset action source record variable.
assignments.name: SetAssetActionSource
assignments.label: Set Asset Action Source

assignments.description: Set the field values in the AssociatedLocationRecord variable to define the relationship between the Account and the Location.
assignments.name: SetAssociatedLocationRecordFields
assignments.label: Set Associated Location Record Fields

assignments.description: Populate the EnergyServiceAgreementItemRecord variable with the appropriate field values.
assignments.name: SetEnergyServiceAgreementItemRecordFields
assignments.label: Set Energy Service Agreement Item Record Fields

assignments.description: Set energy service agreement record fields
assignments.name: SetEnergyServiceAgreementRecordFields
assignments.label: Set Energy Service Agreement Record Fields

assignments.description: Set location record from Get Location to LocationRecord variable
assignments.name: SetLocationRecord
assignments.label: Set Location Record

assignments.description: Populate the OrderProductRecipientRecord variable with the appropriate field values.
assignments.name: SetOrderProductRecipientRecordFields
assignments.label: Set Order Product Recipient Record Fields

assignments.description: Populate the ServicePointRecord variable with the appropriate Service Point field values.
assignments.name: SetServicePointRecordFields
assignments.label: Set Service Point Record Fields

assignments.description: Set service point status to Active.
assignments.name: SetServicePointStatus
assignments.label: Set Service Point Status

assignments.description: Set the Visitor Address in the Location record.
assignments.name: SetVisitorAddressInLocation
assignments.label: Set Visitor Address In Location

collectionProcessors.description: From the output of 'Get Service Points', filter the records where the Market Identifier matches the desired value.
collectionProcessors.name: FilterServicePoint
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Service Point

collectionProcessors.description: Filter Asset Action Source records using the Order Item ID to retrieve the associated Asset.
collectionProcessors.name: SegregateAssetActionSource
collectionProcessors.label: Segregate Asset Action Source

collectionProcessors.description: Filter Service Points by matching their Market Identifier with the Order Product Recipient’s Market Identifier.
collectionProcessors.name: SegregateServicePoint
collectionProcessors.label: Segregate Service Point

decisions.description: Checks if the location already exists by checking the output of Get Location.
decisions.name: DoesLocationExist
decisions.label: Does Location Exist?

decisions.description: Check if the Location record (new or existing) contains a Visitor Address.
decisions.name: DoesLocationHaveAddress
decisions.label: Does the Location Have an Address?

decisions.description: Checks the order product if it has a recipient
decisions.name: DoesOrderProductHaveRecipient
decisions.label: Does the Order Product Have a Recipient?

decisions.description: Verify the existence of a Service Point by checking whether the filtered result from 'Filter Service Point' is not null or empty.
decisions.name: DoesServicePointExist
decisions.label: Does Service Point Exist?

decisions.description: Checks if order product is parent or not
decisions.name: IsItParentOrderProduct
decisions.label: Is It a Parent Order Product?

decisions.description: Check if order item is of sellable product (DualFuel, Energy or Gas)
decisions.name: IsItSellableCommodityOrderProducts
decisions.label: Is It a Sellable Commodity Order Product?

decisions.description: Decision element to determine whether the event emitted by the job is the final one.
decisions.name: IsLastEvent
decisions.label: Is Last Event?

decisions.description: Decision element to check whether the output of the 'Get Service Points' contains any records.
decisions.name: IsThereAnyExistingServicePoint
decisions.label: Is there any existing Service Point?

formulas.description: Formula returns the current date and time using the NOW() method.
formulas.name: CurrentDateTime

formulas.description: Formula returns the Location Name by concatenating the Account Name and the Address keyword.
formulas.name: LocationName

loops.description: Iterate on order items to filter out sellable order item and parent order item
loops.name: IterateOrderProducts
loops.label: Iterate Order Products

loops.description: Iterate over sellable order products to create location, address and service point if not exist
loops.name: IterateSellableOrderProducts
loops.label: Iterate Sellable Order Products

loops.description: Loop through sellable Order Product records to create corresponding Energy Service Agreement Item records.
loops.name: LoopSellableOrderProducts
loops.label: Loop Sellable Order Products

recordCreates.description: Create a new Associated Location record to represent the Account–Location relationship.
recordCreates.name: CreateAssociatedLocation
recordCreates.label: Create Associated Location

recordCreates.description: Create a new Energy Service Agreement record in Salesforce.
recordCreates.name: CreateEnergyServiceAgreement
recordCreates.label: Create Energy Service Agreement

recordCreates.description: Create new Energy Service Agreement Items records in Salesforce using the populated collection.
recordCreates.name: CreateEnergyServiceAgreementItems
recordCreates.label: Create Energy Service Agreement Items

recordCreates.description: Create new Service Point records in Salesforce using the ServicePointRecords collection.
recordCreates.name: CreateServicePoints
recordCreates.label: Create Service Points

recordLookups.description: Get all the asset action sources for all the sellable order products. These asset action sources will be used to get the assets.
recordLookups.name: GetAssetActionSources
recordLookups.label: Get Asset Action Sources

recordLookups.description: Retrieve the location record using the location id of the service points.
recordLookups.name: GetLocation
recordLookups.label: Get Location

recordLookups.description: Get all the OrderItems of the order
recordLookups.name: GetOrderProducts
recordLookups.label: Get Order Products

recordLookups.description: Retrieves all the service point if they exist by matching market identifiers from order product recipient and service point
recordLookups.name: GetServicePoints
recordLookups.label: Get Service Points

recordUpdates.description: Update the Location record with the Visitor Address.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateLocationWithVisitorAddress
recordUpdates.label: Update Location With Visitor Address

recordUpdates.description: Update order product recipients with service point ids.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateOrderProductRecipients
recordUpdates.label: Update Order Product Recipients

recordUpdates.description: Update Service Points status to Active.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateServicePoints
recordUpdates.label: Update Service Points

transforms.description: Collects the location ids from service points
transforms.name: CollectLocationIds
transforms.label: Collect Location Ids

variables.description: Record variable holds field values of the Address object, which are later used to create an Address record.
variables.name: AddressRecord

variables.description: Record variable holds field values of the Associated Location object, which are later used to hold an Associated Location record.
variables.name: AssetActionSourceRecord

variables.description: Record variable holds field values of the Associated Location object, which are later used to create an Associated Location record.
variables.name: AssociatedLocationRecord

variables.description: Record variable holds field values of the EnergyServiceAgreementItem object, which are later used to create an EnergyServiceAgreementItem record.
variables.name: EnergyServiceAgreementItemRecord

variables.description: Collection variable holds newly created Energy Service Agreement Item records within the flow
variables.name: EnergyServiceAgreementItems

variables.description: Record variable holds field values of the EnergyServiceAgreement object, which are later used to create an EnergyServiceAgreement record.
variables.name: EnergyServiceAgreementRecord

variables.description: Record variable holds field values of the Location object, which are later used to create a Location record if not existed.
variables.name: LocationRecord

variables.description: Record variable holds field values of the Order Product Recipient object.
variables.name: OrderProductRecipientRecord

variables.description: Collection holds order product recipients records.
variables.name: OrderProductRecipients

variables.description: Collection variable stores the IDs of sellable order products.
variables.name: SellableOrderProductIds

variables.description: Collection variable holds Order Product records that are sellable and have associated product recipients.
variables.name: SellableOrderProducts

variables.description: Collection variable stores the market identifiers of Service Points retrieved from the Order Product Recipient entity.
variables.name: ServicePointMarketIdentifiers

variables.description: Record variable holds field values of the Service Point object, which are later used to create and hold a Service Point record.
variables.name: ServicePointRecord

variables.description: Collection variable holds Service Point records, including both newly created (within the flow) and existing ones.
variables.name: ServicePoints

variables.description: Collection holds the updated service point records
variables.name: UpdatedServicePoints
